evidence_purpose: Substantiation for implied health benefits on non-health or misclassified product categories.
summary: Implied health benefits on general products require substantiation or claim removal per health implication rules.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Healthier, lower sugar, or wellness outcome on non-supplement product. ACTION: Assess product category fit. CHECK: Nutritional substantiation, comparative basis. ESCALATE IF: Implies medicinal effect.

checks: Confirm product category allows implied health framing
Verify nutritional comparison substantiation if used
Check no disease or cure language
reject_if: Health implication on prohibited product class
